matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Addition of bases or sequence cassette (for example donor insertion, tag insertion, transposon insertion).
evidence: We transient express G4PID in HEK293T cell, meanwhile, miniTurbo serving as a negative control was transfected into HEK293T to promiscuously label proteins in cells.

attributes.route_or_context: added to the warm DMEM media
evidence: Biotin (Sigma-Aldrich) was dissolved in DMSO as 500 mM stock solution and added to the warm DMEM media to a final concentration of 500 μM.
The cells were treated with biotin (500 μM) for 10, 30, 60 min at 37°C
The optimized time point of 30 min was subsequently selected for subsequent experiments.

replicate_hints: Three independent biological replicates were performed
multiplex_channel_hints: label-free quantitative liquid chromatography‐tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS)
SWATH/DIA (Sequential Window Acquisition of all Theoretical Mass Spectra/ Data-Independent Aquisition SWATH mode)

evidence: We transient express G4PID in HEK293T cell, meanwhile, miniTurbo serving as a negative control was transfected into HEK293T to promiscuously label proteins in cells.

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The text explicitly states the use of 'label-free quantitative liquid chromatography–tandem mass spectrometry (LC–MS/MS)' and 'SWATH/DIA (Sequential Window Acquisition of all Theoretical Mass Spectra/Data-Independent Aquisition SWATH mode)'.
A DDA model was used in the first round of detection to build a spectral database, though the primary quantitative data was DIA.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment uses a biotin ligase (miniTurbo fusion G4PID) for proximity labeling of proteins near G-quadruplexes, followed by streptavidin enrichment.
